title: Knowledge economy for sustainable livelihoods: Cold Mountain Shelter value chain analysis in Transdanubian mountain reference landscape
description: A value chain analysis of the Cold Mountain Shelter community under the EU Horizon 2020 MOVING project, focusing on their knowledge-based sustainable livelihood practices. It examines the community’s off-grid permaculture, forest agriculture, and sustainable energy and water management approaches, identifying opportunities to enhance knowledge documentation and training materials for resilience and environmental sustainability.
